name: io.github.aoreshkov/oracle-forms-mcp
description: Serves Oracle Forms module content (.fmb/.mmb/.pll/.olb) from a directory to MCP clients.

packageArguments.name: --forms-dir
packageArguments.description: Directory containing the Oracle Forms modules (in copy-mode, the pre-converted *_fmb.xml/*.pld files live here). Mount it into the container and point --forms-dir at the mount.
